name: consumer-security-slice
description: Targeted consumer-side security-overhead validation slice across plaintext, TLS, and mTLS. This complements the producer final campaign without multiplying it into a full consumer factorial.
implementation_notes: The producer settings seed the topic before the consumer benchmark starts.
consumer_count is intentionally varied while producer_count remains fixed at 1.
This slice contains 36 runs: 3 security modes x 2 message sizes x 2 compression modes x 2 consumer counts x 3 trials.
Run only after deploying the matching Kafka security mode.
